_comment: 每周填写此文件，然后运行 sender.py 发送 newsletter。数据截止见 publish_date；重放历史请设环境变量 NEWSLETTER_AS_OF=YYYY-MM-DD 后执行 generate。

strategy_pulse.zh: **数据截止：2026-04-10（官网发布口径）**。**选股逻辑**：Regime 判定 **BULL** → 动态池内 **多因子打分** → **TOP_N** 输出名单 → **周频再平衡** → 与 Tiger 对账写入 `rotation_positions`。**截至 4/10 收盘的公开持仓**：**LITE**（4/10 当日信号），进/现价基本持平。**同一截止日的已实现亮点**：**ORKA** 当日平仓约 **+12.0%**；周内另有 **CRC 约 +1.7%**、**ELVN 约 +4.9%**、**ERAS 约 +12.0%**；**PSQ** 约 **-3.3%** 体现同一规则下的亏损侧。**说明**：4/11 及之后平仓的记录（如 **MGTX**、账面异常的 **CODI**）**不进入本期官网口径**；全表已平仓样本在截止日内为 **16** 笔，胜率 **50%**，单笔算术平均收益约 **+1.42%**（非未来承诺）。**另**：邮件下方「待确认入场」表列出当前 `pending_entry` 队列及系统生成的选股理由（Supabase：`rotation_positions` + `rotation_snapshots.scores`）。
strategy_pulse.en: **Data cutoff: 2026-04-10 (official web issue).** **Selection stack:** **BULL** regime gate → **multi-factor** ranks inside a **dynamic universe** → **TOP_N** sleeve → **weekly rebalance** → reconciled to **`rotation_positions`** / **Tiger**. **Public book as of 4/10 close:** **LITE** (signal **Apr 10**), ~flat vs entry. **Realized highlights by the same cutoff:** **ORKA** ~**+12.0%** (closed **Apr 10**); also **CRC ~+1.7%**, **ELVN ~+4.9%**, **ERAS ~+12.0%**; **PSQ ~-3.3%** shows the loss side of the same ruleset. **Note:** closes on **Apr 11+** (**MGTX**, distorted **CODI**) are **out of scope** for this release. **16** closed trades with exit ≤ **Apr 10**, **50%** win rate, simple mean **~+1.42%/trade** (not a forecast). **Also:** the **Pending Entry** table lists the live `pending_entry` queue with system-generated rationale (**`rotation_positions`** + **`rotation_snapshots.scores`**).

quant_insight.title_zh: 选股逻辑与收益如何对齐「截止日期」
quant_insight.title_en: Aligning the Selection Story with a Hard Cutoff Date
quant_insight.body_zh:
官网 Newsletter 与「实时仪表盘」可能差一天：**本期固定以 2026-04-10 为会计截止**，所有平仓收益与胜率统计只统计 **exit_date ≤ 4/10** 的记录，避免读者把次日成交误读进本周。

逻辑层不变：**体制门控**决定进攻/防御预算；**多因子横截面排序**决定在同一池子里谁排在前面；**TOP_N + 周平衡**决定最终持仓集合；**执行与对账**把结果钉在数据库里供审计。

收益层：在截止日内，**ORKA** 的 +12% 与 **PSQ** 的 -3.3% 来自同一套排序与风控纪律——好的选股系统必须同时产出可控亏损样本，胜率约一半与 **Walk-Forward** 里「概率优势≠笔笔赢」的结论一致。

技术提示：生成 HTML 时请设置 **`NEWSLETTER_AS_OF=2026-04-10`**，使邮件内「本周平仓」「策略统计」与正文口径一致。
quant_insight.body_en:
A web newsletter can differ from a live dashboard by one session: **this issue freezes on 2026-04-10**. Every realized P&L and win-rate stat includes only trades with **exit_date ≤ Apr 10**, so **Apr 11+** fills cannot leak into “this week.”

The stack is unchanged: **regime gate** sets risk budget; **multi-factor ranks** pick leaders inside the same universe; **TOP_N + weekly rebalance** chooses the tradable set; **execution + reconciliation** pins outcomes for audit.

Returns: **ORKA ~+12%** and **PSQ ~-3.3%** by the same cutoff are two faces of one process — a credible selection system must publish small losses alongside wins; ~**50%** win rate matches “edge ≠ every trade” from **Walk-Forward** thinking.

Ops: set **`NEWSLETTER_AS_OF=2026-04-10`** when rendering HTML so **Closed Trades** + **Strategy Stats** match the editorial cutoff.

strategy_notes.zh: 本期无新增核心参数变更。统计口径：**exit_date ≤ 2026-04-10** 的已平仓共 **16** 笔；胜率 **50%**；单笔算术均值 **+1.42%**。若需与融资材料对齐，仍以 CORE/Walk-Forward 汇总为长期基准，本期为短样本窗口披露。
strategy_notes.en: No core parameter changes this issue. Stats: **16** closes with **exit_date ≤ 2026-04-10**, **50%** win rate, **+1.42%/trade** simple mean. For investor decks, anchor long-horizon metrics to **CORE / Walk-Forward**; this issue is a short, cutoff-bounded window.

blog_feature.title_zh: 动量因子 IC 与 Walk-Forward：排序凭什么站得住脚
blog_feature.title_en: Momentum IC + Walk-Forward: Why the Ranking Is Statistically Grounded
blog_feature.summary_zh: 选股不是主观名单：本文用 IC 与多窗口 Walk-Forward 说明，多因子横截面排序在样本外如何保持置信度，并与 Regime 门控如何叠加。
blog_feature.summary_en: Stock picking isn’t a discretionary list. This post connects IC + multi-window walk-forward evidence to why cross-sectional ranks stay trustworthy OOS — and how regime gating stacks on top.

next_week_outlook.zh:
截止 4/10 后首个完整交易日将带来新的成交与平仓；若 Regime 仍为 **BULL**，继续执行 **TOP_N 周平衡**；若波动率与均线结构恶化，模型将自动收紧进攻——仍以信号为准。

官网复现：发布邮件 HTML 时使用 **`NEWSLETTER_AS_OF=2026-04-10`** 与本期 `weekly_content_draft.json` 配套。
next_week_outlook.en:
The first full session **after Apr 10** will add new fills/closes. If **BULL** persists, keep **TOP_N weekly rotation**; if vol + moving-average structure deteriorate, offense auto-tightens — still signal-driven.

Repro: render with **`NEWSLETTER_AS_OF=2026-04-10`** plus this week’s `weekly_content_draft.json`.

free_teaser_insight.zh: 免费预览：**本期全部数字以 4/10 为截止**——读懂「体制 + 多因子 + TOP_N」后，看 **ORKA +12% / ERAS +12% / ELVN +4.9%** 与 **PSQ -3.3%** 同一规则下的两面；升级付费版查看完整持仓与深度解读。
free_teaser_insight.en: Free teaser: **all numbers freeze on Apr 10** — same ruleset, both sides: **ORKA ~+12% / ERAS ~+12% / ELVN ~+4.9%** vs **PSQ ~-3.3%**. Upgrade for full tables + deep dive.
